data.title: Binance Australia Restores AUD Bank Transfers After Two-Year Disruption
data.description:
Binance Australia has officially restored direct Australian dollar (AUD) deposits and withdrawals, bringing an end to nearly two years of limited fiat access for local users.

data.title: If you invested $1,000 in Robert Kiyosaki’s gold, silver, and Bitcoin portfolio in 2026, here’s your return so far
data.description:
Despite years of gloomy forecasts, best-selling personal finance author and prominent ‘finfluencer’ Robert Kiyosaki’s favorite assets, gold, silver, and Bitcoin (BTC), are all up in early 2026, meaning a $1,000 investment at the start of the year would already be showing a double-digit gain. To see how his strategy is holding up, we calculated the return on a simple $1,000 investment made on January 1, 2026. The Robert Kiyosaki portfolio 2026 performance In the first 19 days of the year, Bitcoin rose 6.59% from $87,412 on New Year’s Day to $93,169 at press time
source: https://finbold.com/if-you-invested-1000-in-robert-kiyosakis-gold-silver-and-bitcoin-portfolio-in-2026-heres-your-return-so-far/

data.title: Tokenized Stock Market Value Rises 16% Over Past Month

As exchanges and fintech platforms continue to integrate these assets, the market size could potentially reach trillions of dollars.

data.title: NYSE Develops Platform for Tokenized Securities Trading and Settlement
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on January 19, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), part of the Intercontinental Exchange Group, announced the development of a platform for tokenized securities trading and on-chain settlement, seeking regulatory approval for its implementation.

The NYSE's new digital platform aims to offer a tokenized trading experience with features such as 24/7 operations, instant settlement, order placement in USD amounts, and stablecoin-based fund transfers. The design integrates the NYSE Pillar matching engine with a blockchain-based post-trade system, enabling multi-chain settlement and custody capabilities.

Upon receiving regulatory approval, the platform will facilitate a new NYSE trading venue, supporting tokenized stock trading interchangeable with traditional issued securities, as well as native digital securities tokens. Tokenized shareholders will retain dividend and governance rights akin to traditional shareholders. The venue is designed to adhere to established market structure principles, providing non-discriminatory access to all qualified broker-dealers for distribution.

The launch of the NYSE tokenized securities platform is part of the Intercontinental Exchange's broader digital strategy, which includes preparing its clearing infrastructure for round-the-clock trading and exploring the integration of tokenized collateral. The Intercontinental Exchange is collaborating with banks such as BNY Mellon and Citigroup to support tokenized deposits within its clearinghouse, aiding clearing members in transferring and managing funds outside traditional banking hours, fulfilling margin obligations, and accommodating financial needs across different jurisdictions and time zones.

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 10 million DUSK tokens from Binance, worth $2.41 million.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, about 10 minutes ago, a newly created wallet withdrew 10 million DUSK from Binance, worth $2.41 million.

data.title: Within one hour of its launch, RWAX had issued over 20 assets, covering various RWA assets including energy, mining, funds, and real estate.
data.description: According to RWAX's official disclosure, within one hour of its launch, the platform had added more than 20 new physical asset projects, demonstrating a strong demand on the RWA asset side for an on-chain public market that is "issueable, tradable, and verifiable". Based on the disclosed asset types, this round of onboarding and issuance covers multiple main themes: Renewable Energy and Revenue Rights: such as RWA tokenization schemes based on hydropower infrastructure and power generation revenue-related assets, and introducing a layered structure design to balance stable returns and long-term appreciation potential; Minerals and Strategic Resources: covering key mineral combinations such as gold, copper, lithium, and rare earths, as well as mining asset tokenization based on a single mining area/project; Precious Metals and Safe-Haven Assets: with gold-related projects as the core targets, emphasizing value storage and risk hedging attributes; Funds and Multi-Strategy Returns: including multi-strategy fund-type RWA structures, providing stable/balanced/growth portfolio allocation paths for different risk preferences; Commercial Real Estate: involving medium-sized commercial properties located in core urban areas, with rental cash flow and asset appreciation as the core narrative; Other Non-Standard Asset Exploration: including structured expressions of non-standard assets such as artworks, further expanding the boundaries of RWA on-chain capabilities. The official statement from RWAX indicates that it will promote the transition from "asset on-chaining" to "public market pricing and liquidity formation" through leaderboard aggregation, trading and liquidity pathways, and in-platform growth tools, forming a replicable RWA listing and market validation process. The platform will continue to disclose more progress on asset onboarding and on-chain issuance, and will also launch tasks and educational content for new users to lower the barrier to entry for RWA.

data.title: YZi Labs launches the third season of its EASY Residency program and transforms it into a year-round startup incubation program.
data.description: YZi Labs has announced the launch of the third season of its EASY Residency program, transitioning from a single, fixed class to a year-round rolling admissions model, allowing founders to apply and be interviewed at any time. The third season establishes long-term bases in New York and the San Francisco Bay Area, where YZi Labs' investors are located year-round. EASY Residency will host three global demo days in 2026: April (Dubai TOKEN2049), August, and December.

data.title: The New York Stock Exchange will launch 24/7 trading service.
data.description: According to market sources, the New York Stock Exchange plans to launch a platform that will enable 24/7 trading of U.S. listed stocks and ETFs.

data.title: NYSE to Enable 24/7 Trading of US Equities
data.description: According to BWEnews, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) is set to introduce 24/7 trading for U.S. equities. This move aims to provide investors with greater flexibility and access to the market at any time. The decision reflects a growing trend towards continuous trading, which has been gaining traction in various global markets. The NYSE's initiative is expected to enhance market liquidity and offer investors more opportunities to respond to global events as they happen. This development marks a significant shift in the traditional trading hours of U.S. equities, aligning with the increasing demand for round-the-clock trading options.

data.title: Tether and Bitqik Launch Initiative to Enhance Financial Literacy in Laos
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether and licensed digital asset exchange Bitqik have announced a strategic plan aimed at improving financial literacy regarding Bitcoin and stablecoins among the people of Laos. Bitqik, a locally licensed exchange offering brokerage and trading services for cryptocurrencies and other digital assets, seeks to expand the reach of blockchain technology in the Lao market through this collaboration. The initiative focuses on promoting the use of USDT and its role in advancing financial inclusion, encouraging broader adoption of USD₮ in Laos's digital finance sector, and motivating communities, students, and entrepreneurs to embrace stablecoin solutions.

data.title: A whale bought 65,700 stETH in the past 4 hours and currently holds 142,777 ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a certain whale borrowed 155 million USDT and bought 65,700 stETH in the past 4 hours. Currently, its two wallets hold a total of 142,777 ETH, worth $460.11 million.

data.title: Perle, the AI ​​data infrastructure founded by a former Scale AI executive, officially launched its S1 event.
data.description: Perle Labs, an AI data infrastructure project founded by a former executive of AI data annotation giant Scale AI, officially launched its Season 1 event today. The project aims to build AI data infrastructure for sovereign nations and enterprises. It has already secured $17.5 million in funding from institutions such as Framework Ventures and CoinFund. During its Beta phase, it completed 1.7 million tasks in less than two months. Season 1 adds high-value data types such as medical, legal, and robotics, and introduces an on-chain reputation system and NFT qualification badges. Users can gradually unlock expert-level work by completing tasks.
